bodyInnerText:
Kim Wermes is a Berlin-based Interdisciplinary Designer and Artist who works in the fields of Webdesign, Sound Design and Graphic Design. He studied Media & Interaction Design (B.A.) at the HS Osnabrück and Audiovisual Arts Computing (M.Sc.) at the Hochschule für Musik Detmold / TH OWL. He did extensive artistic research in the field of music as weaponry, which resulted in his master thesis / installation "Musique Grotesque". Read it here.
